subject: Hudson from Disney's Gargoyles — a stout, bearded gargoyle hunched over a glowing open book in a dimly lit library or stone chamber
description: A stocky, broad-shouldered gargoyle with a white beard and brow ridges leans intently over an open book that glows with soft teal and golden light. The figure's posture is deeply absorbed — chin propped, face close to the pages — suggesting intense study. Tall stacks of books fill the background on either side, partially lit by warm and cool contrasting light sources. The stone texture of the gargoyle's hide contrasts with the warm paper and candlelit atmosphere of the reading space. Despite being typed as a mentor/gargoyle, the figure's expression is concentrated, not aggressive.
foreground: Stout bearded gargoyle leaning over a glowing open book
background: Stacked books, warm and cool contrasting light, stone chamber
